title: Clear time tracking column with api
excerpt: I can clear time tracking column with automations.  But I can not do with api. How do I clear time tracking column without automations?

posts.author: 1fatma (Fatma)
posts.cookedHtml: I can clear time tracking column with automations. But I can not do with api. How do I clear time tracking column without automations?

posts.author: alessandra (Alessandra)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @1fatma,

Welcome to the community!

Our API does not support clearing the Time Tracking column. You must clear the column manually.
